case_title: PULOS, DARCY B. (F/K/A AGUIAR) vs. AGUIAR, GEORGE P.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PULOS, DARCY B. (F/K/A AGUIAR) AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIAR, GEORGE P.
